description: 30 clear JP Morgan technology helpdesk scenarios — investment banking & enterprise IT (Set JP)

cases.title: JPMorgan Markets Login Locked After Failed Attempts
cases.description: Cannot login to JPMorgan Markets trading platform — account locked after 5 failed password attempts. Need access restored before US market open at 7 PM IST.

cases.title: Murex Trade Booking Interface Timeout
cases.description: Murex front-office trade booking screen times out on submit for FX derivatives. Other Murex modules load normally. Blocking EMEA desk trade capture.

cases.title: Spear Phishing Targeting Equities Trading Desk
cases.description: Security incident: equities trading desk received targeted phishing email with fake compliance PDF attachment. One trader opened file before SOC alert broadcast.

cases.title: Trading Floor Bloomberg Keyboard Unresponsive
cases.description: Bloomberg terminal keyboard not responding on Mumbai BKC trading floor. Market data displays but cannot execute BLAST or run analytics functions.

cases.title: SQL Server Deadlock on Risk Reporting Database
cases.description: SQL Server risk reporting database showing persistent deadlocks on VaR calculation stored procedures. Risk reports delayed 3 hours for global risk committee.

cases.title: GlobalProtect VPN Gateway Unreachable From Home
cases.description: GlobalProtect VPN to JPMC corporate network shows 'Gateway unreachable' from home office. Required for after-hours production support on payments platform.

cases.title: Confluence Page Blank After Chrome Update
cases.description: Atlassian Confluence pages load blank white screen in Google Chrome after corporate browser update. Confluence works in Edge on same machine.

cases.title: New Associate Onboarding AD and Trading IDs
cases.description: New associate joining Mumbai Technology team Monday — need AD account, JPMorgan SSO, Murex read access, and ServiceNow profile per HR ticket ONB-JPM-882.

cases.title: FIX Protocol Gateway Connection Dropped
cases.description: FIX protocol gateway connection to external broker dropped at 3 PM IST. Electronic equity orders not reaching exchange. Session shows LOGOUT received unexpectedly.

cases.title: Ransomware Alert on Shared Drive P Drive
cases.description: Security incident: files on shared P drive encrypted with .ryuk extension. CrowdStrike EDR alert on 4 workstations. Project documentation inaccessible.

cases.title: Oracle Exadata Tablespace Full on Payments DB
cases.description: Oracle Exadata PAYMENTS_PROD tablespace 99% full. Real-time payment posting failing with ORA-01653. Transaction volume spike since morning.

cases.title: Microsoft Teams Screen Share Black for Clients
cases.description: Microsoft Teams screen share shows black screen to external client attendees during deal review. Presenter sees content normally on Windows 11 laptop.

cases.title: Laptop Docking Station USB Ports Not Working
cases.description: Lenovo USB-C docking station USB ports not detecting keyboard and mouse on trading desk. Laptop built-in ports work. Dock power LED is green.

cases.title: Firewall Rule Blocking SWIFT Alliance Access
cases.description: Corporate firewall change blocking outbound connectivity to SWIFT Alliance Access server. Cross-border payment messages queuing since 9 AM IST.

cases.title: Splunk Alert API Keys in Git Repository
cases.description: Security incident: Splunk secret scanning detected production API keys committed to internal Git repository in merge request. Repo has 25 developer access.

cases.title: Kafka Consumer Lag on Trade Events Topic
cases.description: Apache Kafka consumer group lag exceeding 2 million messages on trade-events topic. Downstream risk engine not receiving real-time trade data.

cases.title: Resigned VP Revoke All Trading System Access
cases.description: VP resigned effective today — immediate offboarding: disable AD, revoke Murex, Bloomberg, FIX terminal, VPN, and mainframe access per HR exit clearance.

cases.title: Snowflake Warehouse Suspended Credit Exhausted
cases.description: Snowflake analytics warehouse WH_RISK suspended — credit quota exhausted. Regulatory reporting ETL and Tableau dashboards failing since midnight batch.

cases.title: ServiceNow Catalog Request Form Spinner
cases.description: ServiceNow software catalog request form submit button spins indefinitely. No confirmation or error. Incident and change modules work in same browser session.

cases.title: EMEA MPLS Circuit Down Mumbai to London
cases.description: MPLS WAN circuit between Mumbai GIFT City and London data center down since 5 AM GMT. EMEA trading support team cannot reach London production systems.

cases.title: Tableau Server Extract Refresh Failed
cases.description: Tableau Server scheduled extract refresh failed for executive risk dashboard. Error: 'Unable to connect to datasource'. Manual refresh also fails.

cases.title: Trading Workstation Blue Screen MEMORY_MANAGEMENT
cases.description: Trading workstation BSOD with stop code MEMORY_MANAGEMENT during market hours. Machine reboots but crashes again within 15 minutes. Need urgent replacement.

cases.title: MongoDB Atlas Cluster Connection Timeout
cases.description: MongoDB Atlas cluster connection timeouts from client onboarding microservice. API returning HTTP 500. Cluster shows primary node CPU at 95%.

cases.title: Unauthorized RDP to Jump Server From Foreign IP
cases.description: Security incident: SIEM detected successful RDP login to production jump server from IP 45.142.212.73 at 1:15 AM IST. User has no approved travel.

cases.title: Power BI Gateway Offline Cannot Refresh
cases.description: On-premises Power BI data gateway shows offline in Power BI Service. All enterprise dashboards failed refresh since 6 AM IST. Gateway service running on host.

cases.title: NetApp Snapshot Restore Deleted Trade Files
cases.description: Trade confirmation files accidentally deleted from NetApp NAS share. Need snapshot restore from last night 11 PM before regulatory filing deadline Friday.

cases.title: Intune Non-Compliant Device Blocking Outlook Mobile
cases.description: Intune marks iPhone as non-compliant — Outlook mobile cannot sync corporate email. Device encryption enabled but compliance policy shows jailbreak false positive.

cases.title: BKC Office Wi-Fi Slow Packet Loss Floor 22
cases.description: Corporate Wi-Fi on Mumbai BKC office Floor 22 showing 35% packet loss and speeds under 2 Mbps. Wired connection on same desk works at full speed.

cases.title: Jenkins CI Pipeline Failing on Maven Build
cases.description: Jenkins CI pipeline for payments microservice failing at Maven compile step with dependency resolution error. Last successful build was 2 days ago.

cases.title: Smart Badge Denied at Mumbai Office Turnstile
cases.description: Employee smart badge denied at BKC main entrance turnstile with red LED since badge reissue yesterday. Badge works for cafeteria payment system.
